params.value: SELECT Id, Name, OwnerId, Owner.Name, AccountId, Account.Name, IsWon, StageName, Amount, dateTimestampContractreceived__c, CloseDate, RecordType.Name FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = true AND CloseDate >= LAST_N_DAYS:90 AND OwnerId IN ({{JS_Config.repIdInClause()}}) ORDER BY OwnerId, CloseDate DESC LIMIT 2000
